payload.name: XAUUSD Trader Desktop App
payload.description:
Convert the existing telegram-mt5-bot into a simple, distributable desktop GUI application (tkinter). The user sends their own XAUUSD/GOLD trading signals via Telegram (to a bot they control) and the app executes them on MetaTrader 5. 

Key requirements:
1. Desktop GUI using tkinter (built-in Python) — first-run setup wizard for all config
2. Telegram integration using python-telegram-bot (only needs BotFather token, no API_ID/HASH)
3. MT5 signal execution with existing parser logic, TP-split, and martingale
4. Manual signal entry in the app window
5. Build script to package as single .exe using PyInstaller
6. Easy to send to friends — they just run the file

Files to create: config_store.py, signal_parser.py, mt5_engine.py, telegram_bot.py, trader_app.py, build_exe.py, requirements.txt, README.md.
